isNotEmpty.isEqual: DISPLAYNAME LIKE '%' || #search_keyword# || '%' ESCAPE '\' OR DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE '%' || #search_keyword# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
DESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #search_keyword# || '%' ESCAPE '\' OR DESCRIPTION2 LIKE '%' || #search_keyword# || '%' ESCAPE '\'

isNotEmpty.isNotEmpty: UPDATEDT > to_date(#searchStartDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AND UPDATEDT < to_date(#searchEndDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS')

sql.isNotEqual:
CN NOT IN (SELECT CN from TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#)
AND
OR
CN NOT IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'LoginStopUser')

isNotEmpty.isEqual: a.DISPLAYNAME LIKE '%' || #search_keyword# || '%' ESCAPE '\' OR a.DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE '%' || #search_keyword# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
a.DESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #search_keyword# || '%' ESCAPE '\' OR a.DESCRIPTION2 LIKE '%' || #search_keyword# || '%' ESCAPE '\'

isNotEmpty.isNotEmpty: a.UPDATEDT > to_date(#searchStartDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AND a.UPDATEDT < to_date(#searchEndDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS')

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DEPTMASTER ( CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, COMPNM2, DEPTLEVEL, DEPT_CD_PATH, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, CREATEDT, MANUAL_FLAG, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, #v_MAIL#, #v_PARENTCN#, #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, 1, #v_CN#, #v_LDAPPATH#, to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #v_MANUAL_FLAG#, #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 + 1 AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN NOT LIKE 'trash_%' AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DEPTMASTER (CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, USEFLAG, MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADFLAG, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, CREATEDT, MANUAL_FLAG, TENANT_ID, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, COMPNM2, DEPT_CD_PATH, DEPTLEVEL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11, DEPTTREEFLAG ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, 'Y', #v_MAIL#, #v_PARENTCN#, #v_EXTATTR4#, #v_EXTATTR5#, #v_EXTATTR6#, #v_EXTATTR8#, #v_EXTATTR9#, #v_EXTATTR10#, #v_EXTATTR15#, 'Y', #v_LDAPPATH#, to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #v_MANUAL_FLAG#, #v_TENANT_ID#, (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT COMPNM2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) || ',' || #v_CN#, (SELECT DEPTLEVEL + 1 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), #v_EXTATTR11#, #v_DEPTTREEFLAG# )

INSERT INTO TBL_USERMASTER (CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, MAILNICKNAME, UPNNAME, DEPARTMENT, TITLE, TITLE2, TELEPHONENUMBER, HOMEPHONE, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, MOBILE, POSTALCODE, STREETADDRESS, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1,EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADSPATH, SIPURI, UPDATEDT, CREATEDT, MANUAL_FLAG, BIRTH, BIRTHTYPE, PASSWORD, TENANT_ID, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, COMPANY, COMPANY2, PASSWORD_UPDATEDT, FURIGANA, EXTENSIONPHONE, OFFICEMOBILE, USERTREEFLAG ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, #v_MAIL#, #v_MAILNICKNAME#, #v_UPNNAME#, #v_PARENTCN#, #v_TITLE#, #v_TITLE2#, #v_TELEPHONE#, #v_HOMEPHONE#, #v_FAX#, #v_MOBILE#, #v_POSTALCODE#, #v_ADDRESS#, #v_EXTATTR1#,#v_EXTATTR6#, #v_EXTATTR7#, #v_EXTATTR8#, #v_EXTATTR10#, #v_EXTATTR102#, #v_EXTATTR14#, #v_EXTATTR15#, #v_LDAPPATH#, #v_MAIL#, to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #v_MANUAL_FLAG#, #v_BIRTH#, #v_BIRTHTYPE#, #v_PASS#, #v_TENANT_ID#, (SELECT DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT COMPNM2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #v_FURIGANA#, #v_EXTENSION_PHONE#, #v_OFFICE_MOBILE#, #v_USERTREEFLAG# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE USER_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COMPNM2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , DEPTLEVEL , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT DEPT_CD_PATH, DEPTLEVEL FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET COMPNM2 = #v_COMPNM2#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2#, DEPTLEVEL = #v_DEPTLEVEL#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_PARENTCN#, DEPT_CD_PATH = #v_DEPT_CD_PATH# || ',' || CN WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET DEPT_CD_PATH = REPLACE(DEPT_CD_PATH, #v_DEPT_CD_PATH_OLD#, #v_DEPT_CD_PATH# || ',' || #v_CN#), EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3#, COMPNM2 = #v_COMPNM2#, DEPTLEVEL = DEPTLEVEL + #v_DEPTLEVEL_CHANGE# WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE #v_DEPT_CD_PATH_OLD# || ',%' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2#, COMPANY = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3#, COMPANY2 = #v_COMPNM2# WHERE DEPARTMENT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE #v_DEPT_CD_PATH# || ',%' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE PROXYUSERID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND StartDate < to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AND EndDate > to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') ) > 0

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'a=0;', 'a=1;') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE , POSITIONCD , BIRTH , BIRTHTYPE , MAILBOXUSAGE, MAILBOXQUOTA
FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = LOWER(#v_CN#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE , POSITIONCD , BIRTH , BIRTHTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = LOWER(#v_CN#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE ( CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, MAILNICKNAME, UPNNAME, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, DESCRIPTION3, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, COMPANY, COMPANY2, TITLE, TITLE2, TELEPHONENUMBER, HOMEPHONE, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, MOBILE, POSTALCODE, STREETADDRESS, INFO, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, MOBILE_ENABLE, MOBILE_NOTUSE, MOBILE_PIN, SIPURI,PASSWORD, CREATEDT, TENANT_ID, MAILBOXQUOTA, MAILBOXUSAGE ) ( SELECT CN , DisplayName , DisplayName2 , mail , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , DESCRIPTION3 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , COMPANY , COMPANY2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , POSTALCODE , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , to_date(#timeUTC#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') , MOBILE_ENABLE , MOBILE_NOTUSE , MOBILE_PIN , SIPURI , PASSWORD , CREATEDT , TENANT_ID , MAILBOXQUOTA , MAILBOXUSAGE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF (COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, ANNUAL_CANCEL_RULE, USE_ANNUAL_AUTO_GNRT, ANNUAL_GNRT_STD, INITIAL_DATE, USE_MINUS_ANNUAL, USE_ANNUAL_TMNT, ROUND_OFF_RULE, CONF_SET_DATE) VALUES (#companyID#, #tenantID#, '1', '1', '1', to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), '1', '1', '1', to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'))

INSERT INTO TBL_CAR (CAR_ID, CAR_NAME, CAR_NAME2, CAR_NM, CAR_GB, CAR_LEVEL, CAR_STEP, CAR_ACCESS, CAR_UPPER, OWNDEPTID, OWNDEPTNM, OWNDEPTNM2,OWNERID, OWNERNM, OWNERNM2, OWNERPOSITION, OWNERPOSITION2, OWNERCALL, CAR_REGISTER_DATE, DELFLAG, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID, CAR_URL, CAR_EXPLAIN) VALUES (1,#companyName#,#companyName2#,'',1,0,1,null,0,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,0,#companyID#,#tenantID#,null,null)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM ( SELECT CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END DISPLAYNAME2, SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (DEPTLEVEL = 1 OR CN = 'Top') ) A ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, CN , DISPLAYNAME , DESCRIPTION , TITLE , mail , TelephoneNumber , COMPANY , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , mail , TelephoneNumber , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE NULLIF(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, null) IS NOT NULL AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
cn LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE NVL(#v_LANGDATA#, '1') WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE NVL(#v_LANGDATA#, '1') WHEN '1' THEN description ELSE description2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME,CN ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_ENDROW# ) WHERE RNUM > #v_STARTNUM#

SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE NULLIF(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, NULL) IS NOT NULL AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
cn LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE NVL(#strLang#, '1') WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE NVL(#strLang#, '1') WHEN '1' THEN description ELSE description2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'

SELECT USERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERDEPTID, to_char(STARTDATE + $offsetMin$/(24*60), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') as STARTDATE, to_char(ENDDATE + $offsetMin$/(24*60), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') as ENDDATE FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT A.CN , A.DEPTID , A.POSITIONCD , A.PROXY AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, C.physicalDeliveryOfficeName, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.TITLE ELSE A.TITLE2 END TITLE , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.ROLE ELSE A.ROLE2 END ROLE , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE B.COMPNM2 END COMPANYNAME , A.TITLE T1 , A.TITLE2 T2 , B.DISPLAYNAME DESCRIPTION1, B.DISPLAYNAME2 DESCRIPTION2, A.ROLE R1, A.ROLE2 R2, A.JOBID, A.ROLEID, A.MANUAL_FLAG FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.CN = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_CN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY B.DISPLAYNAME
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ( CN, DEPTID, TITLE, TITLE2, ROLE, ROLE2, ROLEID, TENANT_ID, ORDERBY, JOBID, MANUAL_FLAG ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DEPTID#, #v_TITLE1#, #v_TITLE2#, #v_ROLE#, #v_ROLE2#, #v_ROLEID#, #v_TENANT_ID#, #v_EXTATTR15#, #v_JOBID#, #v_MANUAL_FLAG# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(DEPTID) FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END AS DESCRIPTION, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END AS TITLE, MAIL, TELEPHONENUMBER, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, DEPARTMENT, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY U.DISPLAYNAME, U.CN) AS ROWNUM_ FROM TBL_USERMASTER U WHERE NULLIF(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, NULL) IS NOT NULL AND U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_TYPE#), '%') AND U.CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
U.cn LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.displayname ELSE U.displayname2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.title ELSE U.title2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.description ELSE U.description2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
U.mail LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
U.telephonenumber LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.company ELSE U.company2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
UNION ALL SELECT U.CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME ELSE U.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DESCRIPTION, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN J.TITLE ELSE J.TITLE2 END AS TITLE, U.MAIL, U.TELEPHONENUMBER, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.COMPANY ELSE U.COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY, J.ROLL_INFO as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, D.CN AS DEPARTMENT, J.JOBID AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY U.DISPLAYNAME, U.CN) AS ROWNUM_ FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER J INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON D.CN = J.DEPTID AND D.TENANT_ID = J.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON U.CN = J.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = J.TENANT_ID WHERE NULLIF(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, NULL) IS NOT NULL AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID# AND J.ROLL_INFO LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_TYPE#), '%') AND J.CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND J.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
U.cn LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.displayname ELSE U.displayname2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN J.title ELSE J.title2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN D.displayname ELSE D.displayname2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
U.mail LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
U.telephonenumber LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.company ELSE U.company2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
) Z

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, DESCRIPTION, TITLE, MAIL, TELEPHONENUMBER, COMPANY, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, DEPARTMENT, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME, CN) AS ROWNUM_ FROM ( SELECT U.CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME ELSE U.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.DESCRIPTION ELSE U.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DESCRIPTION, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.TITLE ELSE U.TITLE2 END AS TITLE, U.MAIL, U.TELEPHONENUMBER, CASE '1' WHEN '1' THEN U.COMPANY ELSE U.COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY, U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, U.DEPARTMENT, U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 FROM TBL_USERMASTER U WHERE NULLIF(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, NULL) IS NOT NULL AND U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%$v_TYPE$%' AND U.CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
U.cn LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.displayname ELSE U.displayname2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.title ELSE U.title2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.description ELSE U.description2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
U.mail LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
U.telephonenumber LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.company ELSE U.company2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
UNION ALL SELECT U.CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME ELSE U.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DESCRIPTION, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN J.TITLE ELSE J.TITLE2 END AS TITLE, U.MAIL, U.TELEPHONENUMBER, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.COMPANY ELSE U.COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY, UNISTR(J.ROLL_INFO) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, D.CN AS DEPARTMENT, UNISTR(J.JOBID) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER J INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON D.CN = J.DEPTID AND D.TENANT_ID = J.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON U.CN = J.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = J.TENANT_ID WHERE NULLIF(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, NULL) IS NOT NULL AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID# AND J.ROLL_INFO LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_TYPE#), '%') AND J.CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND J.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
U.cn LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.displayname ELSE U.displayname2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN J.title ELSE J.title2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN D.displayname ELSE D.displayname2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
U.mail LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
U.telephonenumber LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%') ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.company ELSE U.company2 END LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
) A ) X WHERE X.ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_PSTARTROW# AND #v_PENDROW#
SELECT COUNT(CN) TOTALCNT FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#

SELECT X.rnum , X.CN , X.MOBILE , X.DISPLAYNAME , X.DISPLAYNAME2 , X.DESCRIPTION , X.DESCRIPTION2 , X.TITLE , X.TITLE2 , X.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , X.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , X.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , TO_CHAR(UPDATEDT + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPDATEDT FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum , A.CN , A.MOBILE , A.DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME2 , A.DESCRIPTION , A.DESCRIPTION2 , A.TITLE , A.TITLE2 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , A.UPDATEDT FROM ( SELECT CN , MOBILE, DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , UPDATEDT FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
ORDER BY UPDATEDT DESC ) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= (#v_ROWPERPAGE# + #v_STARTROW#) ) X WHERE X.rnum >= (#v_STARTROW# + 1)
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_USERMASTER ( CN, DisplayName, DisplayName2, mail, MAILNICKNAME, UPNNAME, Department, Description, Description2, Description3, PhysicalDeliveryOfficeName, Company, Company2, Title, Title2, TelephoneNumber, HomePhone, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, Mobile, postalcode, streetaddress, info, extensionAttribute1, extensionAttribute2, extensionAttribute3, extensionAttribute4, extensionAttribute5, extensionAttribute6, extensionAttribute7, extensionAttribute8, extensionAttribute9, extensionAttribute10, extensionAttribute102, extensionAttribute11, extensionAttribute12, extensionAttribute13, extensionAttribute14, extensionAttribute15, ADSPath, UpdateDT, Mobile_Enable, Mobile_NotUse, Mobile_PIN, SIPURI ,PASSWORD, CREATEDT, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , DESCRIPTION3 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , COMPANY , COMPANY2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , POSTALCODE , STREETADDRESS , INFO ,
#initPermission# AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 ,
(SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'g=1', 'g=0'), 'a=1', 'a=0'), 'm=1', 'm=0') FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 ,
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , to_date(#timeUTC#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATEDT, MOBILE_ENABLE , MOBILE_NOTUSE , MOBILE_PIN , SIPURI, PASSWORD, CREATEDT, TENANT_ID, MAILBOXQUOTA , MAILBOXUSAGE FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET DESCRIPTION = #displayName#, DESCRIPTION2 = #displayName2#, UPDATEDT = TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') WHERE DEPARTMENT = #cn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET COMPANY = #v_DISPLAYNAME#, COMPANY2 = #v_DISPLAYNAME2# WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 = #v_DISPLAYNAME#, COMPNM2 = #v_DISPLAYNAME2# WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET DEPARTMENT = #v_PARENTCN#, DESCRIPTION = (SELECT DISPLAYNAME FROM (SELECT DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) AA), DESCRIPTION2 = (SELECT DISPLAYNAME2 FROM (SELECT DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) AA), PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) AA), COMPANY = (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 FROM (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) AA), COMPANY2 = (SELECT COMPNM2 FROM (SELECT COMPNM2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) AA), UPDATEDT = TO_DATE(#timeUTC#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 = 0,
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #initPermission#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM (SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'g=1', 'g=0'), 'a=1', 'a=0'), 'm=1', 'm=0') AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) b )
WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT a.cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER a INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER b ON a.department = b.cn AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id WHERE a.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY cn
SELECT * FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE a.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY cn
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM ( SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER AND tenant_id = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) WHERE cn = #cn#
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE extensionattribute1 = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM ( SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND LOWER(cn) = LOWER(#cn#) AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) UNION SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND LOWER(cn) = LOWER(#cn#) UNION SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND LOWER(cn) = LOWER(#cn#) ) WHERE LOWER(cn) = LOWER(#cn#)
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE department = #cn# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(U.CN) FROM TBL_USERMASTER U LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE R ON U.CN = R.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = R.TENANT_ID WHERE R.CN IS NULL AND U.CN <> #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (U.CN = #id# OR U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 = #id#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET updatedt = to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), displayName = #v_DISPLAYNAME#, displayName2 = #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 = #v_DISPLAYNAME#, COMPNM2 = #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, mail = #v_MAIL# WHERE cn = #v_CN# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANT_ID#

UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET updatedt = to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS')
displayName = #displayName# displayName2 = #displayName2# mail = #mail# extensionattribute1 = #extensionAttribute1# extensionattribute2 = #extensionAttribute2# extensionattribute3 = #extensionAttribute3# extensionattribute4 = #extensionAttribute4# extensionattribute5 = #extensionAttribute5# extensionattribute6 = #extensionAttribute6# extensionattribute7 = #extensionAttribute7# extensionattribute8 = #extensionAttribute8# extensionattribute9 = #extensionAttribute9# extensionattribute10 = #extensionAttribute10# extensionattribute11 = #extensionAttribute11# extensionattribute12 = #extensionAttribute12# extensionattribute13 = #extensionAttribute13# extensionattribute14 = #extensionAttribute14# extensionattribute15 = #extensionAttribute15# deptTreeFlag = #deptTreeFlag# useUpperDeptBox = #useUpperDeptBox#
WHERE cn = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET updatedt = to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') photo_updatedt = to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS')
displayName = #displayName# displayName2 = #displayName2# title= #title# title2 = #title2# extensionAttribute15 = #extensionAttribute15# extensionAttribute6 = #extensionAttribute6# extensionAttribute14 = #extensionAttribute14# extensionAttribute10 = #extensionAttribute10# extensionAttribute11 = #extensionAttribute11# extensionAttribute1 = #extensionAttribute1# extensionAttribute2 = #extensionAttribute2# extensionAttribute3 = #extensionAttribute3# extensionAttribute102 = #extensionAttribute102# telephoneNumber = #telephoneNumber# homePhone = #homePhone# facsimileTelephoneNumber = #facsimileTelephoneNumber# mobile = #mobile# postalCode = #postalCode# streetAddress = #streetAddress# birthType = #birthType# birth = #birth# info = #info# extensionAttribute7 = #extensionAttribute7# extensionAttribute8 = #extensionAttribute8# mailboxUsage = #mailboxUsage# mailboxQuota = #mailboxQuota# extensionPhone = #extensionPhone# officeMobile = #officeMobile# userTreeFlag = #userTreeFlag#
WHERE cn = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET extensionAttribute1 = #extensionAttribute1# WHERE cn = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET mail = #MAIL# WHERE cn = #CN# AND tenant_id = #TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE
cn = #v_CN# AND
JOBID = #v_JOBID# AND
ROLEID = #v_ROLEID# AND
deptid = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_CN#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_CN#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_CN#
DELETE FROM TBL_LASTDOCID WHERE COMPANYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORMCONTAINER WHERE COMPANYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERTYPE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKCATEGORY WHERE COMPANYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORMPROPERTY WHERE COMPANYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE COMPANYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_LISTOPTION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_LISTINFO WHERE COMPANYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE COMPANYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_COMPANY = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CAR WHERE COMPANYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

DELETE FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY_PATTERN WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT CN, displayName, department, description, mailboxquota, mailboxusage, displayName2, description2, isRetire, title, title2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102, TELEPHONENUMBER, MOBILE, COMPANY, COMPANY2 FROM (
SELECT CN, displayName, department, description, to_number(mailboxquota) as mailboxquota, to_number(mailboxusage) as mailboxusage, displayName2, description2, 0 as isRetire, title, title2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102, TELEPHONENUMBER, MOBILE, COMPANY, COMPANY2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
AND CN IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'LoginStopUser')
AND CN NOT IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'LoginStopUser')
UNION
SELECT CN, displayName, department, description, CAST(mailboxquota AS UNSIGNED) as mailboxquota, CAST(mailboxusage AS UNSIGNED) as mailboxusage, displayName2, description2, 1 as isRetire, title, title2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102, TELEPHONENUMBER, MOBILE, COMPANY, COMPANY2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
ORDER BY
displayName ASC,
displayName DESC,
department ASC,
department DESC,
mailboxusage/1024 ASC,
mailboxusage/1024 DESC,
mailboxquota ASC,
mailboxquota DESC,
(MAILBOXUSAGE/MAILBOXQUOTA)*100 ASC,
(MAILBOXUSAGE/MAILBOXQUOTA)*100 DESC,
displayName, cn )
OFFSET #v_start# ROWS FETCH NEXT #pageCount# ROWS ONLY

SELECT SUM(COUNT) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM (
SELECT COUNT(CN) AS COUNT FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
AND CN IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'LoginStopUser')
AND CN NOT IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'LoginStopUser')
UNION SELECT COUNT(CN) AS COUNT FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
) COUNT_TABLE
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USERMASTER_DELETE ( CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, MAILNICKNAME, UPNNAME, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, DESCRIPTION3, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, COMPANY, COMPANY2, TITLE, TITLE2, TELEPHONENUMBER, HOMEPHONE, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, MOBILE, POSTALCODE, STREETADDRESS, INFO, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, MOBILE_ENABLE, MOBILE_NOTUSE, MOBILE_PIN, SIPURI,PASSWORD, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT CN , DisplayName , DisplayName2 , mail , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , DESCRIPTION3 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , COMPANY , COMPANY2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , POSTALCODE , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , NULL , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') , MOBILE_ENABLE , MOBILE_NOTUSE , MOBILE_PIN , SIPURI , PASSWORD , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USERMASTER_DELETE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USER_JOBMASTER (JOBID, TYPE, CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, USEFLAG, SORT, CREATEDATE, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.NEXTVAL, #v_TYPE#, #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, #v_USEFLAG#, #v_SORT#, SYSDATE, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_TENANTID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT JOBID, TYPE, CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, USEFLAG, SORT, CREATEDATE, COMPANYID FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE JOBID = #v_JOBID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT JOBID, TYPE, CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, USEFLAG, SORT, CREATEDATE, COMPANYID FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE TYPE = #v_TYPE# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SORT

SELECT JOBID, TYPE, CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, USEFLAG, SORT, CREATEDATE, COMPANYID FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE JOBID = #v_JOBID# AND TYPE = #v_TYPE# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USER_JOBMASTER SET DISPLAYNAME = #v_DISPLAYNAME#, DISPLAYNAME2 = #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, USEFLAG = #v_USEFLAG#, SORT = #v_SORT# WHERE JOBID = #v_JOBID# AND TYPE = #v_TYPE# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER
SET TITLE = #v_DISPLAYNAME#, TITLE2 = #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, UPDATEDT = TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = #v_JOBID#
SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 = #v_DISPLAYNAME#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 = #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, UPDATEDT = #nowDate# WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 = #v_JOBID#
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UPDATE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER SET TITLE = #v_DISPLAYNAME#, TITLE2 = #v_DISPLAYNAME2# WHERE JOBID = #v_JOBID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE JOBID = #v_JOBID# AND TYPE = #v_TYPE# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM NUM, A.CN, A.DISPLAYNAME, A.DISPLAYNAME2, A.DEPARTMENT, A.DESCRIPTION, A.DESCRIPTION2, A.TELEPHONENUMBER, A.TITLE, A.TITLE2, A.JOBID, A.ROLEID, A.USERTYPE, A.USERTREEFLAG FROM ( SELECT TBL_USERMASTER.CN, TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME, TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2, TBL_USERMASTER.DEPARTMENT, TBL_USERMASTER.DESCRIPTION, TBL_USERMASTER.DESCRIPTION2, NVL(TBL_USERMASTER.TELEPHONENUMBER, ' ') AS TELEPHONENUMBER, TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.DISPLAYNAME AS TITLE, TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 AS TITLE2, UNISTR(TBL_USERMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7) AS JOBID, UNISTR(TBL_USERMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8) AS ROLEID, 'user' AS USERTYPE, TBL_USERMASTER.USERTREEFLAG, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DEPTTREEFLAG FROM TBL_USERMASTER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_USERMASTER.DEPARTMENT AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID
JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER ON TBL_USERMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.COMPANYID AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TYPE = #v_TYPE# AND TBL_USERMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = #v_JOBID#
JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER ON TBL_USERMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.COMPANYID AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TYPE = #v_TYPE# AND TBL_USERMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 = #v_JOBID#
AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) UNION ALL
SELECT TBL_USERMASTER.CN, TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME, TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2, TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID AS DEPARTMENT, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME AS DESCRIPTION, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DESCRIPTION2, NVL(TBL_USERMASTER.TELEPHONENUMBER, ' ') AS TELEPHONENUMBER, TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TITLE, TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TITLE2, UNISTR(TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.JOBID), UNISTR(TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.ROLEID), 'addJob' AS USERTYPE, TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.USERTREEFLAG, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DEPTTREEFLAG FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON
TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.JOBID
TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.ROLEID
AND TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON TBL_USERMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID = #v_JOBID# AND TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) A
$v_SUBQUERY$
) B WHERE ROWNUM <= (#v_PAGENUM# + #v_PAGESIZE#) ) X WHERE NUM > (#v_PAGENUM#)
ORDER BY USERTYPE, CN
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE TYPE = #v_TYPE# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT A.CN, A.DISPLAYNAME, A.DISPLAYNAME2, A.DEPARTMENT, A.DESCRIPTION, A.DESCRIPTION2, A.TELEPHONENUMBER, A.TITLE, A.TITLE2, A.USERTYPE FROM ( SELECT TBL_USERMASTER.CN, TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME, TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2, TBL_USERMASTER.DEPARTMENT, TBL_USERMASTER.DESCRIPTION, TBL_USERMASTER.DESCRIPTION2, NVL(TBL_USERMASTER.TELEPHONENUMBER, ' ') AS TELEPHONENUMBER, TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.DISPLAYNAME AS TITLE, TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 AS TITLE2, 'user' AS USERTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER
JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER ON TBL_USERMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.COMPANYID AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TYPE = #v_TYPE# AND TBL_USERMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = #v_JOBID#
JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER ON TBL_USERMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.COMPANYID AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TYPE = #v_TYPE# AND TBL_USERMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 = #v_JOBID#
AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)
UNION ALL
SELECT TBL_USERMASTER.CN, TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME, TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2, TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID AS DEPARTMENT, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME AS DESCRIPTION, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DESCRIPTION2, NVL(TBL_USERMASTER.TELEPHONENUMBER, ' ') AS TELEPHONENUMBER, TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TITLE, TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TITLE2, 'addJob' AS USERTYPE FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.JOBID AND TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON TBL_USERMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID = #v_JOBID# AND TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
) A
$v_SUBQUERY$
)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE
JOBID <> #v_JOBID# AND
(DISPLAYNAME = #v_DISPLAYNAME# OR DISPLAYNAME2 = #v_DISPLAYNAME2#) AND TYPE = #v_TYPE# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 = EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 + 1, UPDATEDT = to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 IS NOT NULL AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 >= #v_EXTATTR15#
UPDATE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER SET ORDERBY = ORDERBY + 1 WHERE DEPTID = #v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND ORDERBY IS NOT NULL AND ORDERBY >= #v_EXTATTR15#

UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 = 0, UPDATEDT = to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 IS NULL

UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 = 0, UPDATEDT = to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 IS NULL

UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 = EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 + 1, UPDATEDT = to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 IS NOT NULL AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 >= #v_EXTATTR15#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND CN = #v_CN#
SELECT CN, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE (EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 LIKE #v_DEPTID# || ':%' OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 LIKE '%;' || #v_DEPTID# || ':%') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

select.isNotEqual:
SELECT CN, displayName, displayName2, department, description, description2, company, company2, passwordUpdateDT, loginStopDT FROM
( SELECT CN, displayName, displayName2, department, description, description2, company, company2, TO_CHAR(PASSWORD_UPDATEDT + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS passwordUpdateDT, '' as loginStopDT, ROWNUM NUM FROM TBL_USERMASTER
WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%'
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
AND CN NOT IN ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'LoginStopUser')
ORDER BY PASSWORD_UPDATEDT, displayName, CN )
WHERE NUM >= #v_start# + 1 AND NUM <= #v_start# + #pageCount#
select.isEqual:
SELECT CN, displayName, displayName2, department, description, description2, company, company2, passwordUpdateDT, loginStopDT FROM
( SELECT a.CN, a.displayName, a.displayName2, a.department, a.description, a.description2, a.company, a.company2, TO_CHAR(a.PASSWORD_UPDATEDT + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS passwordUpdateDT, TO_DATE(b.PROPERTY_VALUE, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') + $offset$ / (24 * 60) AS loginStopDT, ROWNUM NUM FROM TBL_USERMASTER a JOIN TBL_USER_CONFIG b ON a.TENANT_ID = b. TENANT_ID AND a.CN = b.USER_ID AND b.PROPERTY_NAME = 'LoginStopUser' WHERE
a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND a.DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%'
AND a.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
ORDER BY a.PASSWORD_UPDATEDT, a.displayName, a.CN )
WHERE NUM >= #v_start# + 1 AND NUM <= #v_start# + #pageCount#

select.isNotEqual:
SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%'
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
AND CN NOT IN ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'LoginStopUser') AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%'
select.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM TBL_USERMASTER a JOIN TBL_USER_CONFIG b ON a.TENANT_ID = b. TENANT_ID AND a.CN = b.USER_ID AND b.PROPERTY_NAME = 'LoginStopUser'
WHERE a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND a.DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%'
AND a.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#

sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_USER_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, USER_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE)
SELECT #tenantID#, #cnArr[]#, 'LoginStopUser', #nowDate# FROM DUAL
sqlMap.update: DELETE FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USER_ID IN ( #cnArr[]# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(*) FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USER_ID = #userID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'LoginStopUser'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET mail = #MAIL# WHERE cn = #CN# AND tenant_id = #TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG WHERE COMPANY_ID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: select distinct user_id from tbl_user_config where property_name in ('notUseMobileLogin', 'adminOrderNotUsedMobileLogin') and property_value = '1' and tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT COUNT(GROUP_ID) TOTALCNT FROM TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
GROUP_NAME LIKE ('%' || #search_keyword# || '%')
CREATE_ID LIKE ('%' || #search_keyword# || '%')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY GROUP_NAME) AS RNUM, GROUP_ID AS GROUPID, GROUP_NAME AS GROUPNAME, CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS CREATEDATE, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATEID, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS UPDATEDATE, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
GROUP_NAME LIKE ('%' || #search_keyword# || '%')
CREATE_ID LIKE ('%' || #search_keyword# || '%')
) WHERE RNUM >= #v_STARTROW# AND RNUM <= #v_ROWPERPAGE#

SELECT A.GROUP_ID AS GROUPID, A.GROUP_NAME AS GROUPNAME, A.CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS CREATEDATE, A.UPDATE_ID AS UPDATEID, TO_CHAR(A.UPDATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS UPDATEDATE, A.COMPANY_ID AS COMPANYID, B.MEMBER_ID AS MEMBERID, B.MEMBER_TYPE AS MEMBERTYPE, TO_CHAR(B.ADDED_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS ADDEDDATE, B.SUB_DEPT_YN AS SUBDEPTYN, B.MEMBER_COMPANYID AS MEMBERCOMPANYID FROM TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST A INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO B ON (A.GROUP_ID = B.GROUP_ID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
A.COMPANY_ID = #v_COMPANY_ID#
AND A.GROUP_ID = #v_GROUP_ID# ORDER BY MEMBERTYPE
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST SET GROUP_NAME = #v_GROUP_NAME#, UPDATE_ID = #v_UPDATE_ID#, UPDATE_DATE = TO_DATE(#v_UPDATE_DATE#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') WHERE GROUP_ID = #v_GROUP_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #v_COMPANY_ID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST WHERE GROUP_ID = #v_GROUP_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #v_COMPANY_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT GROUP_ID AS GROUPID, GROUP_NAME AS GROUPNAME, CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS CREATEDATE, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATEID, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS UPDATEDATE, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #v_COMPANY_ID# ORDER BY GROUP_NAME

SELECT JOBID, TYPE, CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, COMPANYID FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE TYPE = #v_TYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USEFLAG = 'Y'
COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
ORDER BY SORT
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO WHERE GROUP_ID = #v_GROUP_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #v_COMPANY_ID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.GROUP_ID AS GROUPID, GROUP_NAME AS GROUPNAME, CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS CREATEDATE, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATEID, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS UPDATEDATE, TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.COMPANY_ID AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO ON TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.GROUP_ID = TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO.GROUP_ID AND TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.TENANT_ID = TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.COMPANY_ID = TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO.COMPANY_ID WHERE TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.COMPANY_ID = #v_COMPANY_ID#
AND (TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.COMPANY_ID = #v_COMPANY_ID# OR TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.COMPANY_ID = 'Top')
ORDER BY GROUP_NAME
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST ( GROUP_ID, GROUP_NAME, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) VALUES ( #v_GROUP_ID#, #v_GROUP_NAME#, #v_CREATE_ID#, TO_DATE(#v_CREATE_DATE#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #v_COMPANY_ID#, #v_TENANT_ID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO ( GROUP_ID, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_TYPE, MEMBER_COMPANYID, ADDED_DATE, SUB_DEPT_YN, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) VALUES ( #v_GROUP_ID#, #v_MEMBER_ID#, #v_MEMBER_TYPE#, #v_MEMBER_COMPANYID#, TO_DATE(#v_ADDED_DATE#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #v_SUB_DEPT_YN#, #v_COMPANY_ID#, #v_TENANT_ID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE UPDATEDT <= (SYSDATE - #v_days#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END description, CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END displayName, MAIL, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE
CN <> 'masteradmin'
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%' AND DEPARTMENT NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%trash_dept%') ORDER BY PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, DEPARTMENT, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO ( SEQUENCE, USERID, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, TITLE, TITLE2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, AUTHORIZEDTIME, ADMINTYPE, STATUS, AUTHORIZERID, AUTHORIZERNM, AUTHORIZERNM2, AUTHORIZERIP, TENANT_ID ) SELECT SEQ_TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO.NEXTVAL, #userId#, u.displayName, u.displayName2, #deptId#, (SELECT ua.DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER ua WHERE CN = #deptId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#), (SELECT ua.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER ua WHERE CN = #deptId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#), CASE WHEN U.DEPARTMENT = #deptId# AND U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = #jobId# THEN U.TITLE ELSE (SELECT adj.TITLE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER adj WHERE adj.CN = #userId# AND adj.DEPTID = #deptId# AND adj.JOBID = #jobId# and adj.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# ) END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN U.DEPARTMENT = #deptId# AND U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = #jobId# THEN U.TITLE2 ELSE (SELECT adj.TITLE2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER adj WHERE adj.CN = #userId# AND adj.DEPTID = #deptId# AND adj.JOBID = #jobId# and adj.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# ) END AS TITLE2, u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, u.COMPANY, u.COMPANY2, to_date(#authorizedTime#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #adminType#, #status#, #authorizerId#, (SELECT ua.DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER ua WHERE CN = #authorizerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#), (SELECT ua.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER ua WHERE CN = #authorizerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#), #authorizerIp#, u.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER u WHERE u.CN = #userId# AND u.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

INSERT INTO TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO ( SEQUENCE, USERID, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, TITLE, TITLE2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, AUTHORIZEDTIME, ADMINTYPE, STATUS, AUTHORIZERID, AUTHORIZERNM, AUTHORIZERNM2, AUTHORIZERIP, TENANT_ID ) SELECT SEQ_TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO.NEXTVAL, #userId#, u.displayName, u.displayName2, u.department, u.DESCRIPTION, u.DESCRIPTION2, u.TITLE, u.TITLE2, u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, u.COMPANY, u.COMPANY2, to_date(#authorizedTime#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #adminType#, #status#, #authorizerId#, (SELECT ua.DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER ua WHERE CN = #authorizerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#), (SELECT ua.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER ua WHERE CN = #authorizerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#), #authorizerIp#, u.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER u WHERE u.CN = #userId# AND u.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #cn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #cn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #cn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT A.TITLE, A.TITLE2 AS title1, A.TENANT_ID, D.DISPLAYNAME AS description, D.DISPLAYNAME2 AS description1 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON A.DEPTID = D.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #CN# AND A.DEPTID = #DEPTID# AND A.JOBID = #JOBID# AND A.ROLEID = #ROLEID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #TENANTID#

SELECT CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.COMPANY ELSE C.COMPANY2 END COMPANY, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.DESCRIPTION ELSE C.DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.TITLE ELSE C.TITLE2 END TITLE, A.CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME2 END ADDJOBDEPTNM, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.TITLE ELSE A.TITLE2 END ADDJOBTITLE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.CN = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND C.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
ORDER BY C.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, C.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15

SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION, MAIL, TELEPHONENUMBER, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE NULLIF(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, NULL) IS NOT NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND
CN <> 'masteradmin'
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%=1%' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) ORDER BY PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, DISPLAYNAME, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 desc, DESCRIPTION, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND JOBID = #v_JOBID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_PERMMSION# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UPDATE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER SET ROLL_INFO = #v_PERMMSION# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND JOBID = #v_JOBID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #CN# AND DEPTID = #DEPTID# AND JOBID = #JOBID# AND ROLEID = #ROLEID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID#
SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE DEPARTMENT = #cn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 + 1 AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_PARENTCN# AND CN NOT IN ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ORDERBY FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE DEPTID = #v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_TOP_COMPANY (COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE) VALUES (#companyID#, #tenantID#, #menuType#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.JOBID, A.TITLE, A.TITLE2, A.ROLE, A.ROLE2, A.USERTREEFLAG, A.ORDERBY FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A WHERE JOBID = #v_JOBID# AND A.CN = #v_CN# AND A.DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER SET ORDERBY = #v_ORDERBY#, USERTREEFLAG = #v_USERTREEFLAG# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND JOBID = #v_JOBID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT ALL INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP (company_id, tenant_id, menu_id, menu_used, company_lang, company_order) VALUES (#companyID#, #tenantID#, -1, 1, 1, -1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP (company_id, tenant_id, menu_id, menu_used, company_lang, company_order) VALUES (#companyID#, #tenantID#, -2, 1, 1, -2) SELECT * FROM dual

INSERT ALL INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH (menu_id, company_id, tenant_id, user_id, access_YN, user_type, sn, subdept_permitted) VALUES (-1, #companyID#, #tenantID#, #companyID#, 1, 0, 0, 'Y') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH (menu_id, company_id, tenant_id, user_id, access_YN, user_type, sn, subdept_permitted) VALUES (-2, #companyID#, #tenantID#, #companyID#, 1, 0, 0, 'Y') SELECT * FROM dual

INSERT ALL INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (-1, 1, #companyID#, #tenantID#, '연계') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (-1, 2, #companyID#, #tenantID#, 'Connection') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (-1, 3, #companyID#, #tenantID#, '連携') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (-1, 4, #companyID#, #tenantID#, '关联') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (-1, 5, #companyID#, #tenantID#, 'Connection') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (-1, 6, #companyID#, #tenantID#, 'Connection') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (-2, 1, #companyID#, #tenantID#, '연계') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (-2, 2, #companyID#, #tenantID#, 'Connection') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (-2, 3, #companyID#, #tenantID#, '連携') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (-2, 4, #companyID#, #tenantID#, '关联') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (-2, 5, #companyID#, #tenantID#, 'Connection') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (-2, 6, #companyID#, #tenantID#, 'Connection') SELECT * FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE (TYPECODE, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, TYPENAME, TYPENAME2, DESCRIPTION, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, WRITEDATE) VALUES ('PORTLET', #tenantID#, #companyID#, '포틀릿', 'Portlet', '(연계)포틀릿 컨피그', #companyID#, #companyName#, #companyName2#, TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))

INSERT INTO TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG (CODE, CODEVALUE, DESCRIPTION, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, TYPECODE) VALUES ('PORTLET_STANDARD', '{ "portletType":"standard",' ||CHR(10)|| '"viewType": "list",' ||CHR(10)|| '"connectType": "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"paging":"",' ||CHR(10)|| '"listCnt":"",' ||CHR(10)|| '"width":"",' ||CHR(10)|| '"height":"",' ||CHR(10)|| '"linkUrl": "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"mobileLinkUrl": "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"restUrl": "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"httpMethodType":"",' ||CHR(10)|| '"headerParam" : "{ }",' ||CHR(10)|| '"dataParam" : "{ }",' ||CHR(10)|| '"dataParamType" : "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"dataResultType" : "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"dataResultFormat" : {' ||CHR(10)|| '"rootPath" : "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"totalCnt" : "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"dataInfo" : {' ||CHR(10)|| '"title" : "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"writer" : "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"date" : "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"linkUrl" : "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"mobileLinkUrl" : "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"width" : "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"height" : ""' ||CHR(10)|| '}' ||CHR(10)|| '},' ||CHR(10)|| '"dbType": "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"dbIp": "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"dbPort": "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"dataBase": "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"dbUser": "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"dbPwd": "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"dbDataQuery": "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"totalCntQuery": "",' ||CHR(10)|| '"driverClassName" : ""' ||CHR(10)|| '}', '연계 포틀릿 기본 설정', #companyID#, #companyName#, TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #tenantID#, #companyID#, 'PORTLET' )

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP (COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, MENU_ID, MENU_USED, COMPANY_LANG, COMPANY_ORDER) SELECT #companyID#, #tenantID#, TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP.MENU_ID, 1, 1, TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP.MENU_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU ON TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP.MENU_ID = TBL_PORTAL_MENU.MENU_ID WHERE TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP.COMPANY_ID = 'Top' AND TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP.MENU_ID >= 0 AND TBL_PORTAL_MENU.MENU_TYPE = 'MG' AND TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH (MENU_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) SELECT TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH.MENU_ID, #companyID#, #tenantID#, #companyID#, 1, 0, 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU ON TBL_PORTAL_MENU.MENU_ID = TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH.MENU_ID WHERE TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH.COMPANY_ID = 'Top' AND TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH.MENU_ID >= 0 AND TBL_PORTAL_MENU.MENU_TYPE = 'MG' AND TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (MENU_ID, MENU_LANG, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, MENU_NAME) SELECT TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME.MENU_ID, TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME.MENU_LANG, #companyID#, #tenantID#, TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME.MENU_NAME FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU ON TBL_PORTAL_MENU.MENU_ID = TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME.MENU_ID WHERE TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME.COMPANY_ID = 'Top' AND TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME.MENU_ID >= 0 AND TBL_PORTAL_MENU.MENU_TYPE = 'MG' AND TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
